name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Income support to eligible farmer families with cultivable land. Provides ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments.
offline_office: Common Service Center (CSC) / Agriculture Department Office
application_steps: Receive installments directly in bank account
benefits: ₹6,000/year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) - Scholarships
description: Centralized platform for various scholarship schemes for students from class 1 to post-graduate level.
offline_office: Institute Scholarship Cell / District Education Office
benefits: Scholarship amount varies from ₹5,000 to ₹50,000 per year depending on scheme

name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to every rural household willing to do unskilled manual work.
application_steps: Apply for Job Card at Gram Panchayat
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed wage employment at state-specific wage rates

name: PMAY-G (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin)
description: Housing for all rural poor. Provides financial assistance for construction of houses.
application_steps: Get household details verified by local body
Follow construction milestones for fund release
benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹1,30,000 for house construction

name: PMBY (Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana)
description: Accident insurance scheme providing ₹2 lakh coverage at premium of just ₹330 per year.
application_steps: Visit bank branch with Aadhaar and account details
benefits: Accidental death and disability cover of ₹2 lakh

name: PMJJBY (Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana)
description: Life insurance scheme providing ₹2 lakh life cover at premium of ₹436 per year.
benefits: Life insurance cover of ₹2 lakh on death

name: PMEGP (Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme)
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Credit-linked subsidy programme for setting up micro-enterprises and generating employment.
benefits: Subsidy on project cost up to 35% for general category, 50% for special categories

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Provides free LPG connections to BPL families to reduce health hazards from traditional cooking fuels.
target_group: BPL families and women from poor households
application_steps: Get KYC verification at LPG distributor
Receive first refill and stove free of cost
Pay subsidized rates for subsequent refills
benefits: Free LPG connection with stove and first refill

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for girl child education and marriage expenses with tax benefits.
application_steps: Open account at post office or bank
Make regular deposits for better returns
benefits: Interest rate of 7.6% (current) with tax benefits under Section 80C

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers with guaranteed minimum pension.
application_steps: Receive PRAN card and account details
benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension from age 60 onwards

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
application_steps: Repay loan as per agreed terms
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh in three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,001 to ₹5 lakh), Tarun (₹5,00,001 to ₹10 lakh)

name: Digital India Land Records Modernization Programme (DILRMP)
description: Modernization of land records system to ensure transparency and reduce disputes.
benefits: Transparent and accessible land records, reduced disputes, easier transactions

name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
description: Central sector scheme providing pension benefits to elderly, widows, and disabled persons.
target_group: Elderly, widows, and disabled from BPL families
application_steps: Obtain application form from social welfare office
Submit to district social welfare officer
benefits: Monthly pension: ₹200-₹500 for elderly, ₹300 for widows, ₹300-₹500 for disabled

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
description: Skill development program for rural youth to place them in wage employment.
benefits: Free skill training with placement assistance and post-placement support

name: National Livelihood Mission (NLM)
description: Poverty alleviation program through self-employment and skill training.
application_steps: Form or join Self Help Group (SHG)
benefits: Financial assistance, skill training, and market linkage support

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Skill certification and reward scheme to enable youth to take up industry-relevant skill training.
benefits: Free skill training with certification and monetary reward of ₹8,000

name: National Health Mission (NHM)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Comprehensive healthcare program providing accessible and affordable healthcare services.
target_group: All citizens, especially rural and urban poor
offline_office: Primary Health Centers / Community Health Centers
application_steps: Access maternal and child health services
benefits: Free/subsidized healthcare services, medicines, and diagnostic tests

name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: National Health Protection Scheme providing health coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year.
application_steps: Get e-card issued at empaneled hospital
Avail treatment up to ₹5 lakh coverage
benefits: Health coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care

name: Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM)
description: Clean India Mission promoting sanitation and solid waste management.
application_steps: Get incentive amount transferred to bank
benefits: Financial assistance for toilet construction (₹12,000 for individual household latrine)

name: National Rural Drinking Water Programme (NRDWP)
description: Providing safe drinking water in rural areas.
benefits: Access to safe and adequate drinking water supply

name: Pradhan Mantri Adarsh Gram Yojana (PMAGY)
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Integrated development of villages with more than 50% SC population.
benefits: Integrated infrastructure development, education, health, and economic facilities

name: National Urban Livelihoods Mission (NULM)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Poverty alleviation program for urban poor through skill development and self-employment.
application_steps: Choose skill training or self-employment option
benefits: Skill training, financial assistance, and market support for urban poor

name: Smart Cities Mission
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Urban renewal and retrofitting program to develop smart cities.
application_steps: Check if city is selected under Smart Cities Mission
Access smart city services and infrastructure
benefits: Improved urban infrastructure, smart services, and better quality of life

name: AMRUT (Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Providing basic services like water supply, sewerage, and transport to urban households.
application_steps: Check AMRUT projects in your city
benefits: Improved water supply, sewerage, transport, and green spaces

name: National Education Policy (NEP) Implementation
description: Comprehensive education reform program for quality education at all levels.
application_steps: Access NEP benefits through educational institutions
Develop skills through new education framework
benefits: Quality education, skill development, and better career opportunities

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme
description: Credit facility for farmers to meet cultivation expenses and agricultural needs.
application_steps: Apply at bank branch with required documents
Get credit limit approved based on land holding
Receive KCC card and credit facility
benefits: Credit limit up to ₹3 lakh with interest subvention of 2% on timely repayment

name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-Dhan (PM-SYM)
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers with matching contribution from government.
benefits: Minimum assured pension of ₹3,000 per month after age 60

name: National Pension System (NPS)
description: Voluntary retirement savings scheme for systematic savings during working life.
application_steps: Open NPS account through POP center
Choose investment options and pension fund
benefits: Tax benefits under Section 80CCD, market-linked returns, systematic retirement planning

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: Financial inclusion program providing access to banking services.
application_steps: Access banking services and overdraft facility
benefits: Zero balance account, RuPay debit card, accident insurance cover, overdraft facility

name: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Promotes entrepreneurship among women and SC/ST communities.
benefits: Composite loan between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for Greenfield projects

name: Startup India Scheme
description: Promotes startup ecosystem through tax benefits and funding support.
application_steps: Get tax benefits and funding access
benefits: Tax exemption for 3 years, self-certification compliance, fast-track patent filing

name: Digital India Programme
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
description: Transforming India into digitally empowered society and knowledge economy.
benefits: Digital literacy, access to online services, digital payments, e-governance

name: Make in India Initiative
description: Promotes manufacturing in India and attracts foreign investment.
application_steps: Apply through Make in India portal
benefits: Investment facilitation, policy support, infrastructure development, skill development

name: Skill India Mission
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Comprehensive skill development program to train youth for employment.
benefits: Free skill training, certification, job placement assistance, entrepreneurship support

name: Swachh Bharat Abhiyan - Urban
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Urban cleanliness and solid waste management program.
benefits: Clean urban environment, better sanitation, disease prevention

name: National Solar Mission
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Promotes solar energy generation and installation of solar panels.
application_steps: Receive subsidy and net metering benefits
benefits: Subsidy up to 40% for solar systems, reduced electricity bills, clean energy

name: Pradhan Mantri Sahaj Bijli Har Ghar Yojana (Saubhagya)
description: Providing electricity connections to all households.
benefits: Free electricity connection for BPL families, subsidized for others

name: Deendayal Upadhyaya Gram Jyoti Yojana (DDUGJY)
description: Rural electrification program for power supply to agricultural and rural loads.
application_steps: Get separate feeders for agricultural and domestic use
benefits: 24x7 power supply to rural areas, separate agricultural feeders, reduced losses

name: National Mission on Sustainable Agriculture
description: Promotes sustainable agriculture through climate-resilient practices.
application_steps: Access subsidies for equipment and inputs
benefits: Sustainable farming practices, climate resilience, improved productivity

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
description: Expands cultivated area with assured irrigation and improves water use efficiency.
application_steps: Improve crop productivity with assured irrigation
benefits: Assured irrigation, water conservation, increased crop productivity

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides soil health information to farmers for balanced fertilizer use.
application_steps: Get soil health report with recommendations
Improve soil fertility and crop yield
benefits: Soil health information, balanced fertilizer recommendations, improved crop yield

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
description: Promotes organic farming and traditional agricultural practices.
application_steps: Form group of farmers for organic farming
Access premium markets for organic products
benefits: Financial assistance for organic farming, certification support, market access

name: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
description: Online trading platform for agricultural commodities.
application_steps: Receive payment directly in bank account
benefits: Better price discovery, transparent trading, wider market access

name: National Mission on Food Processing
description: Promotes food processing industries and reduces post-harvest losses.
benefits: Financial assistance for food processing, technology upgradation, market access

name: Operation Flood (White Revolution)
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Dairy development program making India self-sufficient in milk production.
benefits: Assured market for milk, better prices, technical support, breeding services

name: Blue Revolution
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Development of fisheries and aquaculture sector.
application_steps: Access financial assistance for fish farming
Get quality fish seed and feed
Market fish produce through organized channels
benefits: Financial assistance, training, market access, infrastructure development

name: National Livestock Mission
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Sustainable development of livestock sector.
benefits: Financial assistance, breeding services, veterinary care, market access

name: National Horticulture Mission
description: Development of horticulture crops and post-harvest infrastructure.
benefits: Financial assistance, quality planting material, training, market access

name: National Bamboo Mission
description: Promotes bamboo cultivation and bamboo-based industries.
benefits: Financial assistance, quality planting material, training, market access

name: National Beekeeping and Honey Mission
description: Promotes beekeeping and honey production.
benefits: Financial assistance, training, quality bee colonies, market access

name: National Rural Livelihoods Mission (NRLM)
description: Poverty reduction through self-employment and skill development.
benefits: Financial assistance, skill training, market access, social mobilization

name: National Urban Health Mission (NUHM)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Urban healthcare program for urban poor and slum dwellers.
application_steps: Access maternal and child health services
benefits: Free healthcare services, medicines, diagnostic tests, health education

name: National Mental Health Programme (NMHP)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Mental healthcare services and awareness programs.
target_group: All citizens needing mental health support
benefits: Free mental health services, counseling, treatment, rehabilitation support

name: National AIDS Control Programme (NACP)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: HIV/AIDS prevention, treatment, and care program.
application_steps: Get HIV testing at designated centers
benefits: Free HIV testing, ART medication, counseling, prevention services

name: National Tuberculosis Elimination Programme
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: TB prevention, diagnosis, and treatment program.
application_steps: Get TB testing at government facilities
benefits: Free TB diagnosis and treatment, nutritional support, follow-up care

name: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Control and prevention of vector-borne diseases like malaria, dengue, chikungunya.
application_steps: Get free treatment for vector-borne diseases
Use preventive measures like bed nets
benefits: Free diagnosis and treatment, preventive measures, awareness programs

name: National Leprosy Eradication Programme
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Leprosy detection, treatment, and rehabilitation program.
benefits: Free treatment, surgery, rehabilitation, social integration support

name: National Blindness Control Programme
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Blindness prevention and treatment program.
target_group: All citizens, especially elderly and diabetics
application_steps: Get eye screening at government facilities
benefits: Free eye screening, cataract surgery, treatment, vision aids

name: National Deafness Control Programme
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Hearing impairment prevention and treatment program.
benefits: Free hearing screening, treatment, hearing aids, rehabilitation

name: National Mental Health Rehabilitation Programme
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Rehabilitation services for persons with mental illness.
benefits: Disability certificate, rehabilitation services, skill training, employment support

name: National Programme for Rehabilitation of Persons with Disabilities
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Comprehensive rehabilitation services for persons with disabilities.
benefits: Disability certificate, assistive devices, education support, employment opportunities

name: National Trust for the Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Welfare and rehabilitation services for persons with specific disabilities.
target_group: Persons with autism, cerebral palsy, mental retardation, multiple disabilities
benefits: Rehabilitation services, respite care, legal guardianship, financial assistance

name: Deendayal Disabled Rehabilitation Scheme (DDRS)
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Rehabilitation services for persons with disabilities through NGOs.
benefits: Rehabilitation services, assistive devices, skill training, employment support

name: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase/Fitting of Aids and Appliances (ADIP)
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Financial assistance for purchase of assistive devices.
benefits: Free assistive devices, fitting services, training, maintenance

name: National Fellowship for Persons with Disabilities
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Fellowship for higher education for persons with disabilities.
benefits: Monthly fellowship for higher education and research

name: Scholarships for Students with Disabilities
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Scholarships for pre-matric, post-matric, and higher education.
benefits: Scholarship amount varies from ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month

name: National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education (NSIGSE)
description: Incentive for girls from SC/ST communities to complete secondary education.
benefits: ₹3,000 incentive amount deposited in fixed deposit

name: National Scheme of Incentive to the Girl Child for Higher Education
description: Incentive for girls from minority communities for higher education.
benefits: Scholarship amount for tuition fees and maintenance

name: National Merit Scholarship Scheme
description: Merit-based scholarships for post-matric and higher education.
benefits: Scholarship amount based on merit and course of study

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMS)
description: Scholarship for economically weaker but meritorious students.
application_steps: Apply through school for NMMS exam
Get selected based on merit and income
benefits: ₹12,000 per annum scholarship amount

name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
description: Merit-based scholarships for college and university students.
application_steps: Get selected based on merit and income
benefits: ₹10,000 to ₹20,000 per annum scholarship amount

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girls
description: Scholarship for girl students in technical education.
application_steps: Get selected based on merit and income
benefits: ₹30,000 per annum scholarship amount

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship Scheme for Differently Abled Students
description: Scholarship for differently abled students in technical education.
target_group: Differently abled students in technical education
application_steps: Get selected based on merit and disability
benefits: ₹30,000 per annum scholarship amount

name: National Overseas Scholarship Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Scholarship for higher studies abroad for SC/ST students.
offline_office: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Tuition fees, living expenses, and other allowances for overseas studies

name: Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Fellowship for M.Phil and Ph.D. studies for SC/ST students.
benefits: Monthly fellowship amount for M.Phil and Ph.D. studies

name: Maulana Azad National Fellowship Scheme
description: Fellowship for M.Phil and Ph.D. studies for minority students.
benefits: Monthly fellowship amount for M.Phil and Ph.D. studies

name: National Scholarship Scheme for Persons with Disabilities
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Scholarship for students with disabilities for higher education.
benefits: Scholarship amount for tuition fees and maintenance
